creator: yvan.vanhullebus@netasq.com
text:
On Wed, Jun 24, 2009 at 10:30:15AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net/scapy,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/135996 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/135996

Some other things will need to be fixed soon, but nothing new with
this patch, so it is ok for me.


Yvan.
